history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark hair is sitting on a metal railing outdoors, looking down. He is wearing a dark blue zip-up hoodie with large white numbers "29" on the chest and light-wash, baggy denim jeans. He has on white sneakers with red accents. The background features a modern building with large glass windows reflecting trees and the sky, as well as a yellow pillar. The ground is concrete with yellow and black speed bumps. The lighting appears to be natural daylight, creating soft shadows. The overall mood is casual and relaxed. The color palette is dominated by blues, grays, and whites, with pops of yellow and red.
